para.name: scope
para.heading: SCOPE
para.text: All agencies are required to keep a detailed record of each employee's attendance on an ATTENDANCE RECORD (28-1408-5151) [AM-204-17-1].

para.name: purpose
para.heading: PURPOSE
para.text: The purpose of this record is to: (1) serve as a document for the recording of each employee's attendance during a calendar year; and (2) supply supervisors with the necessary information regarding their employees' attendance.

para.name: employees-involved
para.heading: EMPLOYEES INVOLVED
para.text: An ATTENDANCE RECORD must be prepared and retained for each City employee.

para.name: other-attendance-report
para.heading: OTHER ATTENDANCE REPORT
para.text: An agency's PAYROLL ATTENDANCE REPORT (147-019) [AM-204-16-1] must be prepared in addition to an ATTENDANCE REPORT.
